command: pyslang rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_axi_write_ingress.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_pcie_vdm_parser.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_mctp_parser.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_context_table.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_sram_packer.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_axi_read_egress.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_sram_arbiter.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_descriptor_queue.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_apb_regfile.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_cdc.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5.sv rtl/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5_param.vh && verilator --lint-only -Wall -Irtl -f list/mctp_assembler_scratch_v5.f --top-module mctp_assembler_scratch_v5
